title: elho Loft Urban Saucer Round 28 - Saucer for Outdoor & Accessories - Ø 27.5 x H 3.5 cm - Brown/Terra
features: ALWAYS A HEALTHY PLANT | For the best care for your plant, a dish is very important. Because it ensures that the excess water gets drained away, preventing the roots from rotting.

NO RING MARKS | Has your plant been given too much water? Then the dish will make sure that it is collected and doesn’t end up on the floor underneath. So, no ugly ring marks on your table or terrace.
RECYCLED PLASTIC | With an Elho dish, you can trust that you’ve got yourself a durable product made using the highest quality of recycled plastic, and it is completely recyclable.
WHEN ITS FREEZING COLD | One tip: when it’s freezing, temporarily remove the dish, to stop the roots of your plants from getting frozen.
PERFECT MATCH | With the broad range of Elho dishes, you can always find a fitting dish for your flower pot.
description: Product Description green basics tomato pot Do you want to grow your own tomatoes? There is nothing like fresh, juicy tomatoes from our own cultivation With the green basics tomato pot, you already have everything you need for your own rearing adventure. The box contents include a practical frame that grows with the plants, so that they can grow undisturbed anytime and anywhere. A practical water reservoir ensures that the plants never dry out. The cultivation pot is also ideal for other vegetables. Place several pots next to each other and you have your own vegetable garden. green basics potato pot With the potato pot from the elho collection, you can easily grow your own potatoes on a small scale. The pot consists of an inner and outer pot. Plant the seed potatoes in the inner pot and keep an eye on growth development by lifting the inner pot. If your potatoes are large enough, they can be harvested easily by removing the inner pot. With good care, new potatoes grow constantly - until the first frost in autumn. The pot also ensures that mould and disease do not get into your garden soil and you can grow potatoes every year. The potato pot consists of an inner and an outer pot. All products from the Green Basics collection are made from recycled plastic. The UV filter ensures that the colour of the pot does not fade when you put it in the sun. The pot is light in weight and can withstand impacts if accidentally dropped. green basics cultivation table Grow your own vegetables or fruit outside on your balcony or patio. With this practical cultivation table from elho you have your own vegetable garden at an ideal working height. Watch your plants grow, from small cuttings to tastiest vegetables or fruits, easily from your own garden. Thanks to the hollow feet and an opening, excess water can easily drain off. A special seed lid is also available, which allows plants to grow even faster and are also protected from birds, bugs and the blazing sun for a perfect harvest. light garden It tastes best at home: Vegetables and herbs from our own cultivation are not to be top. With elho light garden, you can grow vegetables and herbs comfortably all year round. The grow lamp has a day/night switch to allow plants to grow naturally.
